block_00: Use the calendar to your advantage
block_01: What if you could look at a calendar that would tell you when an important event will happen and which currency it may influence? It actually exists and it is called the economic calendar.
block_02: The calendar is available for free on IQ Option and it indicates the next moment of possible high volatility and the direction the currency might go in. This analysis tool is irreplaceable for traders that want to stay on top of any price changes.
block_03: Learn how to use the calendar to find forecasts that can guide you and help you make better trades.
block_09: Economic Events of 2021: A Year in Review
